messages.content: You triage Driftwood (a SaaS task-tracker) support tickets. Reply with ONLY a JSON object with keys: category (string), priority (low|medium|high|urgent), sentiment (negative|neutral|positive), needs_human (boolean), draft_reply (string). No prose, no code fences. Watch for tickets that are polite on the surface but negative underneath, and for ambiguous categories — escalate (needs_human=true) when unsure.

Subject: CSV export drops the assignee column

Exporting any board to CSV produces an empty assignee column, even though every task has an assignee in the UI. Our weekly report is built from that export.

response.content: {"category":"bug","priority":"medium","sentiment":"neutral","needs_human":false,"draft_reply":"Thanks for reaching out about bug — we're on it and will follow up shortly."}
